title: Banana Pancakes

steps.text: Mash the banana with a fork or hand mixer, add the rest of your Wet Ingredients, and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, combine the Dry Ingredients and mix together.
Pour your dry ingredients into your wet ingredients and whisk until just combined.
Lightly coat a pan with oil and preheat on medium. When the pan is preheated, add enough batter to the pan to form pancakes in your desired size.
After 2-3 minutes or when the bottom of the pancakes are browned, lightly spray the top of the pancakes with oil to prevent any sticking, then flip, and cook the topside.
Once cooked to your liking, remove the pancakes from pan, and optionally garnish with a few slices of bananas.
Time to eat.

tips: If bulking or for greater flavor, substitute two whole eggs for the egg whites.

steps.text: In a large bowl, separate egg whites from the yolks and place yolks in a separate bowl.
Add milk, vanilla extract, and salt to the yolks.
Into the egg yolk mixture, sift flour, protein powder, and baking powder. You can do this by using a strainer and gently shaking the flour-laden strainer until it is empty. Whisk to combine.
Start blending the egg whites using a hand mixer on low speed. When it begins to foam, add 1/4 of the erythritol at a time, and add more once the sweetener is completely mixed in.

Once the erythritol has been completely mixed in, the egg whites should be very close to forming stiff peaks and it is time to add the cream of tartar and mix for an additional 30 seconds or until stiff peaks have formed.
Take a quarter of the meringue and vigorously mix it into the egg yolk mixture.

Take the remaining meringue, pour it on top, and gently fold it in until the mixture has JUST BARELY come together. • The goal here is to not overwork the batter because that will cause the pancake to be noticeably less fluffy.
Transfer finished batter to a plastic gallon bag and when ready to cook, cut the corner of the bag off.

Lightly spray a preheated pan on low with oil and pipe batter into the pan where the middle of the pancake will be. Let gravity do the work while slowing raising the bag up as the pancake gets taller and spreads out.
Repeat for the other pancakes, add a few drops of water into the pan, and cover.
Let pancakes cook for 3-5 minutes, lightly spray the top of each pancake, flip, and cover.
Let the pancakes cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, plate it, pour some sugar- free syrup on top, and enjoy!
Preheat pan on stovetop on medium low.
Add Filling Ingredients into a medium bowl and mix with a hand mixer or whisk until smooth. Add Egg Wash ingredients into another medium bowl and whisk until smooth.
Flatten a slice of bread with a rolling pin, then layer filling across the bread. Roll the bread up, keeping the filling inside. It does not have to be rolled up super tight.
Add a little bit of extra filling to the end of the bread and firmly press down to seal.
Repeat until all rolls are finished.
Place the first piece of stuffed french toast into egg wash, and let it soak up as much liquid as possible.
Once french toast is almost falling apart, add it to pan, and repeat with other pieces.
Top the french toast with any extra egg wash and cook 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown on each side.
While cooking, mix Icing Ingredients in a small bowl. Slowly add a few drops of water at a time and mix until the icing reaches your desired consistency.
Top french toast with brown sugar and icing and IT’S TIME TO EAT!
In a large bowl, add egg whites, sweetener, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt. Mix with whisk or hand blender for 60 seconds or until all ingredients are incorporated.
Dip slices of bread one at a time in the wet mixture, soak for one minute, flip, and let bread soak on the other side for an additional minute.
Lightly spray a preheated pan on medium heat with oil. Place a soaked slice of bread into the pan.

Repeat for the additional slices. Lightly spray top of french toast with oil spray and let them cook for 20 minutes, flipping halfway through. • If there is extra egg mixture leftover, pour it on top of the bread before spraying the french toast with oil.

While the french toast cooks, add butter, cream cheese, and salt into a large bowl. Blend for 5 minutes using a hand mixer. • Pause halfway through to scrape down the sides of the bowl, then continue mixing.
Add cake batter extract and vanilla extract to the bowl and continue mixing for an additional 3 minutes.
In 3 parts, add confectioners erythritol to the bowl. Add more sweetener once each part is fully mixed in. This blend should take 5 minutes in total.
When finished mixing, add sprinkles and fold into frosting.
Put frosting into a plastic container and refrigerate. • You can use the frosting right away, but it tastes best after sitting in the fridge for 1-2 hours.
Add one slice of french toast to your plate, top with 1/3 of the frosting, spread evenly, and repeat for the other two slices of French toast.
Let’s eat.

title: Breakfast Sausage

steps.text: Put all ingredients into a bowl, mix thoroughly, and form into 46.5g balls.
Flatten balls to about a ¼-½ inch thick patty and add to a preheated pan on medium heat. You should hear that sizzle as soon as it hits the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until lightly brown.

tips: Have sage or thyme, but need to grind it down? Use a food processor or coffee grinder to do so. It becomes ground sage or thyme in seconds. T I P : Spray hands with oil for an easier time forming patties. T I P : Let meat mixture sit in the fridge up to 24 hours to amplify the flavor profile.

ingredients.item: fat-free milk Salt and black pepper, to taste
La Banderita® Carb Counter taco tortillas
slices original Velveeta® cheese Optional: Pace® picante salsa

steps.text: Dice tomatoes and pat green chiles with paper towel to remove some of the moisture.
Take minced onion, add just enough water to cover, then heat in microwave for 30 seconds. Drain the water and pat onions dry with a towel. They should be soft at this point.
Add egg, egg whites, milk, salt, and pepper to a container and whisk together.
Add butter to preheated pan on medium heat, spread it around, and add egg mixture.
Constantly move eggs around the pan with a spatula until just slightly wet or about 15 seconds from being done since there will be carryover cooking.
Add tomatoes, green chiles, and onion to eggs and mix together just before eggs finish cooking.
Add egg to a plate or container and add BREAKFAST SAUSAGE PATTY mix to a separate preheated pan on medium heat.
Using a spoon, continuously break apart the sausage mix into small pieces while constantly stirring until meat is browned and in small pieces.
Lay tortillas on counter, add 1 slice of cheese to each, followed by the meat, and eggs.
Bring the ends of the tortilla in while slowly flipping one side of the tortilla over the filling.
Use the end of the tortilla to bring filling towards the middle and seal the filling in and finish by rolling until completely sealed.
Add burritos to separate pieces of parchment paper, roll them up, and throw in the microwave for 30 seconds.
Let sit for 1-2 minutes, grab some salsa, and it’s time to EAT.

title: 200 Calorie

ingredients.item: La Banderita® Carb Counter taco tortillas
egg Salt, to taste Black pepper, to taste

steps.text: Place each tortilla on a separate piece of parchment paper. Tear the cheese slices in half and lay them across the middle of the tortilla leaving about 1 inch of space on each end.

Cook the bacon on griddle or in a pan on high. Once bottom of bacon is cooked to your preference, flip it, cook the other side, and put on a paper towel lined plate to cool. Reserve some bacon fat from the pan.
Add egg whites, egg, salt, and black pepper to a large bowl and whisk together.
Add bacon fat to a preheated pan on medium heat and spread evenly.
Add egg mixture to the pan and keep moving the eggs around with a spatula until fully cooked, then place them on a plate or into a container.
Chop bacon and evenly spread onto the tortilla followed by the scrambled eggs.
Bring the ends of the tortilla in while slowly flipping one side of the tortilla over the filling.
Use the end of the tortilla to bring filling towards the middle, seal the filling in, and finish by rolling until completely sealed.
Wrap the burrito in parchment paper and repeat the same process for the other burrito.
Put burritos in the microwave for about 30 seconds, let cool for a minute, and enjoy.

tips: Cook a full package of bacon the first time you make these so that you have bacon ready for the entire week and can make your breakfast come together that much faster.

title: Honey Butter

ingredients.item: chicken breasts D R E D G E S TAT I O N 1
black pepper D R E D G E S TAT I O N 2
salt H O N E Y B U T T E R (Per Biscuit)

steps.text: PREP AND BRINE the chicken breasts.
Cut chicken into 140g cutlets.
Set up Dredge Station 1 in a medium bowl, whisk, add chicken, cover with plastic wrap, and put into the fridge for at least 1 hour.
Put as many biscuits as you need into a preheated oven, put extras in a plastic bag and into the fridge, and follow the cooking instructions on the label.
Set up Dredge Station 2 in a container, grab a piece of chicken from Dredge Station 1, let excess drip off, and put it into the flour.
Shake container around to get flour all over the chicken and press more flour into the chicken itself and its crevices to get it completely covered.
Shake off any excess, add to a wire rack, and repeat for all pieces of chicken.
Add chicken to a preheated air fryer at 350°F, lightly spray each side with oil, and cook for 8-10 minutes or until internal temperature is 155°F.
Add honey butter ingredients into a small bowl and whisk.
When biscuits are out of the oven and cooled, cut each biscuit into thirds, discarding the middle third. • The goal is to make the biscuit weigh about 37g to reduce calories.
Add honey butter to each side of the biscuit and add Sriracha into the container that just had the honey butter in it.
Mix the Sriracha and honey butter remnants together and brush onto chicken.
Add chicken in-between the biscuits and EAT.

tips: Use an extra biscuit with a layer removed to add more volume to your meal. Just cut the chicken in half and split it between biscuits.

title: Lemon Glaze Muffins

ingredients.item: granulated erythritol (add 20g if using lemon extract)

steps.text: In a large bowl, add the Wet Ingredients and whisk to combine.
In another large bowl, add the Dry Ingredients and whisk to combine.

Add Dry Ingredients into the bowl of the Wet Ingredients and whisk until just BARELY combined — overmixing will result in chewy muffins. • To make sure everything is combined, fold the mixture 3-4 times and scrape the bottom of the bowl with a silicone spatula.

Line 14 muffin liners on a sheet pan, add 59g of muffin mix to each liner, and bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 16-18 minutes. • You know they are done when a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin has some crumbs sticking to it, but nothing wet.
While the muffins are baking, prepare the glaze by microwaving butter in a small bowl in ten second intervals until melted.
In a medium bowl, add the melted butter, powdered sugar, lemon juice, and lemon zest for the glaze. Whisk to combine.
Put parchment paper below a wire rack, add hot muffins to the rack, top each muffin with glaze, and spread the glaze around the top of the muffin using a spatula.
Store muffins in a paper towel lined air-tight container and enjoy for the next 3-4 days.

tips: If you want a moister muffin, pull them about one minute before they are done. They will be slightly underdone, but it’ll make them so much more flavorful in my opinion.

title: Banana Bread

steps.text: In a large bowl, add bananas and break them down using a fork or an immersion blender.
Add the Wet Ingredients to the bowl and whisk to combine.
In another large bowl, add the Dry Ingredients and whisk to combine.

Add Dry Ingredients into the bowl of the Wet Ingredients and whisk until just BARELY combined — overmixing will result in chewy muffins. • To make sure everything is combined, fold the mixture 3-4 times and scrape the bottom of the bowl with a silicone spatula.

Line 13 muffin liners on a sheet pan, add 58g of muffin mix to each liner, and bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 16-18 minutes. • You know they are done when a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin has some crumbs sticking to it, but nothing wet.
Store muffins in a paper towel lined air-tight container or simply throw them in a plastic bag and enjoy for the next 3-4 days.

tips: If you want a moister muffin, pull them about one minute before they are done. They will be slightly underdone, but it’ll make them so much more flavorful in my opinion.

title: Pumpkin Pie Muffins

ingredients.item: brown sugar erythritol (add 20g if using PEScience Multipurpose protein powder)
granulated erythritol (add 20g if using PEScience Multipurpose protein powder)
PEScience Pumpkin Pie protein powder (90g PEScience Multipurpose protein powder if sold out)
pumpkin spice (6g if using PEScience Multipurpose protein powder)

steps.text: In a large bowl, add bananas and break them down using a fork or an immersion blender.
In a large bowl, add the Wet Ingredients and whisk to combine.
In another large bowl, add the Dry Ingredients and whisk to combine.

Add Dry Ingredients into the bowl of the Wet Ingredients and whisk until just BARELY combined — overmixing will result in chewy muffins. • To make sure everything is combined, fold the mixture 3-4 times and scrape the bottom of the bowl with a silicone spatula.

Line 13 muffin liners on a sheet pan, add 59g of muffin mix to each liner, and bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 16-18 minutes. • You know they are done when a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin has some crumbs sticking to it, but nothing wet.
Store muffins in a paper towel lined air-tight container or simply throw them in a plastic bag and enjoy for the next 3-4 days.

tips: If you want a moister muffin, pull them about one minute before they are done. They will be slightly underdone, but it’ll make them so much more flavorful in my opinion.

ingredients.item: xanthan gum M I X- I N

steps.text: Add the eggs, egg yolk, and erythritol to a large bowl and whisk to combine.
Add the rest of the Wet Ingredients to the bowl and whisk to combine.
In another large bowl, add the Dry Ingredients and whisk to combine.

Add Dry Ingredients into the bowl of the Wet Ingredients and whisk until just BARELY combined — overmixing will result in chewy muffins. • To make sure everything is combined, fold the mixture 3-4 times and scrape the bottom of the bowl with a silicone spatula.
Add blueberries to a medium bowl, top with flour, and shake the bowl to evenly distribute the flour. This will stop the blueberries from sinking to the bottom while cooking.
Add blueberries to the batter and fold them in until evenly distributed.
Line a jumbo muffin pan with large baking cups, lightly spray each cup with oil to prevent sticking, and add 170g of batter to each cup.
In a small bowl, add turbinado sugar. Using a zester, add the zest from a medium lemon into the bowl and mix to combine.

Top each muffin with the sugar mixture and blueberries. Bake in a preheated 300°F oven for 33-37 minutes. • You know they are done when a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin has some crumbs sticking to it, but nothing wet.
Let muffins cool on a wire rack for 1 hour and store in a paper towel lined air-tight container or simply throw them in a plastic bag and enjoy for the next 3-4 days.

title: Jumbo Chocolate Chip Muffins

ingredients.item: xanthan gum M I X- I N / T O P P I N G
mini chocolate chips Jumbo Chocolate Chip Muffins

steps.text: Add the eggs, egg yolk, granulated erythritol, and brown sugar erythritol to a large bowl and whisk to combine.
Add the rest of the Wet Ingredients to the bowl and whisk to combine.
In another large bowl, add the Dry Ingredients and whisk to combine.

Add Dry Ingredients into the bowl of the Wet Ingredients and whisk until just BARELY combined — overmixing will result in chewy muffins. • To make sure everything is combined, fold the mixture 3-4 times and scrape the bottom of the bowl with a silicone spatula.
Add 45 grams of chocolate chips to the batter and fold them in until evenly distributed.
Line a jumbo muffin pan with large baking cups, lightly spray each cup with oil to prevent sticking, and add 140g of batter to each cup.

Add remaining chocolate chips to a small bowl, top each muffin with chocolate chips, and bake in a preheated 300°F oven for 28-32 minutes. • You know the muffins are done when a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin has some crumbs sticking to it, but nothing wet.
Let muffins cool on a wire rack for 1 hour and store in a paper towel lined air-tight container or simply throw them in a plastic bag and enjoy for the next 3-4 days.

tips: For the ultimate eating experience, pop the muffin in the microwave for 10-15 seconds before indulging. This will make the muffin soft, ultra moist, and melt the chocolate chips to perfection.

title: Jumbo Pumpkin Cheesecake Muffins

steps.text: Add all cheesecake ingredients into a high sided container and using an immersion blender, mix ingredients until smooth.
Put a gallon bag in a cup, add the cheesecake to it, close the bag, and freeze.
Add the dry ingredients to a large bowl and whisk to combine.
In another large bowl, add the wet ingredients and whisk to combine.

Add dry ingredients into the bowl of the wet ingredients and whisk until just BARELY combined — overmixing will result in chewy muffins. • To make sure everything is combined, fold the mixture 3-4 times and scrape the bottom of the bowl with a silicone spatula.
Line a jumbo muffin pan with large baking cups, lightly spray each cup with oil to prevent sticking, and add 140g of batter to each cup.
Take the back of a spoon and spin it in the middle of the batter while pushing the batter up the sides of the baking cups until there is a circular hole about 1.5” deep. Repeat for each muffin.
Grab the cheesecake filling, cut the tip of the gallon bag, and distribute the filling evenly to each muffin.
Bake in a preheated 300°F oven for 32-36 minutes. • You know the muffins are done when you shake the muffin pan and the middle of the cheesecake filling still has a little bit of jiggle to it.
Let muffins cool on a wire rack for an hour and store in a paper towel lined air- tight container or simply throw them in a plastic bag and enjoy for the next 3-4 days.

tips: For the ultimate eating experience, freeze them in a plastic bag and microwave them for 60-75 seconds when ready to eat. Let them sit for 1 minute and the muffin should be warm while the cheesecake is still cold and soft. These muffins will store in the freezer for 2-3 months.

title: Chicken Strips

steps.text: Preheat oven to 400°F.
Cut chicken breasts into 1-2” thick strips.
Set up dredging station with 3 containers. Meal prep containers work best in this instance.
Put flour in first container, an egg in the second, and breadcrumbs in the third.
Beat egg with a whisk until smooth.
Lay one strip at a time in the flour and thoroughly cover. Make sure to get flour into all of the crevices of the chicken to ensure full coverage.
Put the chicken strip in the egg wash, making sure it is thoroughly coated. Let excess egg wash drip off of the chicken before transferring to the breadcrumb station.
Lay the chicken on top of the breadcrumbs, pick up the container and start shaking it back and forth to fully coat the chicken strip.
Once coated, cover with additional breadcrumbs and push them into the chicken and its crevices to make sure full coverage is achieved.
Place the breaded chicken strip on a sheet pan with a baking rack and repeat until all chicken strips are finished.
Bake chicken strips in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until internal temperature has reached 155°F.
Separate into five even servings. When you are ready to eat, add one serving to a bowl, add 45g hot sauce, and toss.
Reheat in the oven or air fryer for 3-4 minutes at 350°F and coat with hot sauce right before serving.

tips: Bake your chicken strips in an air fryer at 400°F for 6-8 minutes to cook your tenders faster and make them crispier. T I P : Use a sauce brush to coat the tenders with hot sauce for a more even coat and no risk of the breading coming off.

title: JalapeÑO Popper

ingredients.item: slices of bread (35 Cal) Spray oil

steps.text: Thinly slice green onions, shred cheese, and add to a medium-sized bowl. Add the cream cheese, black pepper, and salt.
Dice the jalapeños and add to a preheated pan on medium heat until blistering. • If you’re concerned about spice levels, remove the seeds from the jalapeño to reduce the spiciness.
Once the jalapeños blister, use a garlic press to mince garlic into the middle of the pan. Cook until fragrant, then add mixture to the bowl with the cheeses.
Mix everything in the bowl until thoroughly combined.
Using the same pan and keeping the heat on medium, lightly spray pan with oil and add bread to pan. Lightly spray the top of bread with oil as well.
Once browning starts to occur on the bottom side of the bread, flip it over and add the cheese mixture to one of the slices of bread.
Take the other slice of bread and place the toasted side onto the cheese mixture. Once the bottom slice of bread is toasted, flip over to toast the other side.

Once finished, put in microwave for 15-20 seconds or until cheese starts melting down the sides. • Due to thickness of this grilled cheese, if you want a truly melty consistency this step is an absolute must.

tips: If bread is too soft after the microwave, put back on the pan for 1-2 minutes per side to crisp back up.

ingredients.item: chicken breasts D R E D G E S TAT I O N 1
all-purpose flour D R E D G E S TAT I O N 2
egg white D R E D G E S TAT I O N 3
grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese Buns (110 cal) Oil spray

steps.text: Prep and BRINE the chicken breasts.
Cut chicken into 140g cutlets.
Set up dredging stations by adding all Dredge Station Ingredients to three separate containers and mixing until well combined.
Take one piece of chicken and add it to Dredging Station 1.
Cover with flour, making sure to get into all the crevices, and shake off excess flour.
Add chicken to Dredging Station 2 and completely soak with egg, making sure there are no dry spots.
Move chicken to Dredging Station 3 and again completely cover with the breadcrumb mixture, making sure to press it into the chicken and all its crevices.
Put finished chicken on a wire rack and repeat the process until all chicken is breaded.
Spray bottom of air fryer, add chicken to a preheated 400°F air fryer, and lightly spray the top of the chicken with oil.
Air fry for 6-8 minutes or until internal temperature of the chicken reaches 155°F. • Halfway through cooking, flip chicken and lightly spray with oil.
With about 2 minutes remaining on the chicken, toast your buns on the bagel setting in a toaster to make sure only the insides of the buns are browned.
Add chicken to bottom bun followed by the marinara sauce and grated parmesan.
Put the top bun on and ENJOY.
In a bowl, add softened butter, garlic, parsley, olive oil, grated parmesan, and salt. Mix thoroughly.
Evenly spread the butter mix on each slice of bread and add to a preheated pan on medium heat, butter side down.
After 3-4 minutes or when the bottom of the bread starts to brown, flip bread and place half of the fat-free mozzarella and half of regular mozzarella on top of each slice.
Heat the Italian Sausage up in the microwave for 15 seconds if necessary and add to one of the slices of bread.
Turn burner down to low and add HOMEMADE MARINARA , parmesan and other slice of bread cheese side down on top of the sausage.
Once both sides of the bread are browned, remove sandwich from heat and put in the microwave for 15 seconds.
Cut in half or enjoy it whole.

ingredients.item: Amish Farms® baby swiss cheese (thinly sliced)

steps.text: Take two slices of bread, add RUSSIAN DRESSING onto both, and spread out evenly.
Add 1 slice of baby swiss to each slice of bread.
Add the corned beef and pastrami to one of the slices of bread and close the sandwich with the other slice.
Lay sandwich on parchment paper, fold closed, and heat in the microwave for 1 minute.
Take sandwich out of parchment paper and add it to a preheated pan on medium heat until bottom side is browned.
Once bottom side is browned, flip and repeat.
Add sauerkraut to the sandwich, cut in half, and it’s time to eat.

title: Ham And Cheese Pita

ingredients.item: light mayonnaise Tomato, chopped Lettuce, chopped

steps.text: Add a pita to a preheated pan on medium heat, add cheese and ham, and warm for 1-2 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Place pita on a sheet of parchment paper, add mayonnaise, tomato, and lettuce. Wrap the pita in parchment paper and microwave for 10 seconds.
Let sit for one minute and enjoy.

tips: If you need to eat ASAP, put pita directly on a piece of parchment paper, add ham and cheese, wrap it up, and heat up in the microwave for 20- 30 seconds. To finish, add mayonnaise and veggies.

ingredients.item: La Banderita® Carb Counter taco tortillas
La Banderita® Carb Counter taco tortilla

steps.text: ROAST poblanos, take outer layer of skin off, and shred cheese.

Lightly spray a preheated cast iron pan on medium high heat, add ground beef, and flatten it into the pan using a spatula. Top the meat with salt and break the meat down into smaller chunks with a wooden spatula.
Constantly stir beef until cooked through, then set aside on a plate or in a separate container.
Put a tortilla on the counter and on the bottom half of it add half of each cheese, poblanos, salsa, beef, and the other half of each cheese and fold the top half of the tortilla over.
In a small container, add butter and heat up in the microwave for 20-30 seconds or until melted.

Brush a thin layer of butter on the top half of the quesadilla, then add the quesadilla to a preheated pan on medium heat, butter side down. Brush the remaining butter on the other side of the quesadilla.
After 1-2 minutes, flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Cut it in half, plate it, and it’s time to eat.

title: Steak Tacos

ingredients.item: oaxaca cheese, shredded Cilantro and onion, to taste Steak Tacos

steps.text: Trim any excess fat from the skirt steak and tenderize using pointed teeth side of tenderizer.
Place steak in a gallon zipper bag and add all of the Marinade Ingredients to the bag.
Close bag and shake to cover the steak thoroughly in marinade. Making sure every crevice of the steak has marinade on it is important for even flavor.
Place the bag in the fridge for a minimum of 4 hours and up to 24. More time = more flavor.
Turn grill to high and let it preheat for 15 minutes.
Cook steaks on the grill, 2-3 minutes per side.
Wrap steak in aluminum foil and let sit on the counter for 15-30 minutes.
Dice an onion, chop cilantro, and shred cheese for taco topping.
Cut steak against the grain into bite-sized pieces.
Weigh out 126g of cooked steak, heat up 3 tortillas, add Toppings, and enjoy!

tips: When getting your steak from the store ask the deli to cut the fat off for you. This will save you time. T I P : You can also do this in a pan, but there will be a ton of smoke. If your kitchen doesn’t have a vent hood, you are guaranteed to set off fire alarms. I would suggest opening a couple of windows and facing a fan towards the window to ventilate the smoke.

title: Sloppy Joes

ingredients.item: brown sugar erythritol Keto Culture® buns (50 Cal)

steps.text: Dice peppers, Jalapeños, peeled carrots, and onion. Mince garlic.
Add olive oil to a saucepan on medium-high heat then add chopped veggies. Cook the vegetables until they are soft or start to take on some color.
Make a small hole in the middle of the pan, add minced garlic, and stir until garlic becomes fragrant.
Add meat to the pan, mash with a spatula or potato masher. Add salt as the meat cooks.
Stir every 1-2 minutes until meat is fully cooked through.
While the meat is cooking, combine ketchup, mustard, and brown sugar in a separate bowl to make the sauce.
When you see some browning and the meat is no longer pink, it is done, and it is time to add the sauce to the pot.
Combine the sauce and meat in the pan, turn your burner to low, and let the sauce simmer for 20-30 minutes stirring occasionally.
Once sauce has thickened, separate your meat into 10 equal portions, add a portion to your bun, and enjoy! (Each portion should be about 120-130g each.)

tips: Taste meat before serving and add salt if necessary.

ingredients.item: elbow macaroni M I X- I N S

steps.text: Add Pasta Mixture to a pot, put on the stovetop, stir to combine, and turn on high heat.
Set a 10-minute timer for the pasta.
Add parmesan, fat-free cheese, and corn starch into a bowl and mix to combine.
Stir pasta more frequently as it comes to a boil to avoid burning the milk or having the noodles stick to the bottom of the pot.
After 10 minutes, take the pasta pot off the heat and immediately add Velveeta®. Stir for 1-2 minutes or until melted.
Add corn starch mixture and stir constantly for 2-3 minutes until everything is melted and mixed thoroughly.
Let pasta sit for 2 minutes to help thicken the cheese.
Give pasta a stir, pour into a bowl, and it is time to eat.

ingredients.item: medium shells pasta M I X- I N S / T O P P I N G S

steps.text: Add Pasta Mixture to a pot, put on the stovetop, stir to combine, and turn on high heat.
Set a 10-minute timer for the pasta.
Add chicken strips to a preheated air fryer and cook according to the instructions on the package.
Stir pasta more frequently as it comes to a boil to avoid burning the milk or having the noodles stick to the bottom of the pot.
After 10 minutes, take the pasta pot off the heat and immediately add fat-free cheese and Velveeta®. Stir for 1-2 minutes or until melted.
Add buffalo sauce, mix for an additional minute, and let pasta sit for 2 minutes to thicken up.
Give pasta a stir, pour into a bowl, top with chicken and blue cheese, and it is time to eat.
Place fennel seeds on a preheated pan on medium-low for 2 minutes or until they start to take on some color.
Crush fennel seeds using a mortar and pestle or food processor.
Into a large bowl, add fennel and all other ingredients, mix to combine, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 2-3 hours.
Take out a 92g serving, form in desired shape/s, and add to a preheated pan on medium high heat for 2 minutes per side or until internal temperature has reached 155°F.
Repeat step 4 and store any extra in the fridge.
Mix all Seasoning ingredients in a small bowl until combined.
Cut the tomato in half, remove the seeds with a spoon, and dice the remaining tomato.
Rough chop a few pieces of lettuce and shred the sharp cheddar cheese.
Lightly spray a pan with oil, turn the burner on medium-low, and start adding small chunks of ground beef until all the beef is in the pan.
Once all the beef is added, lightly spray the top of meat with oil and sprinkle the seasoning over the top.
Stir the meat every 1-2 minutes until browned and seasoned.
Pour meat into container or onto plate and cover.
Into a large pan on low heat, add one tortilla at a time and heat for about 15- 30 seconds or until pliable.
Using scissors, cut a small circle from another tortilla, about a fifth of the size of the tortilla. This will be used to help keep the Crunchwrap® sealed.
Place the larger warmed tortilla on the counter and add nacho cheese, ground beef, and cheddar cheese. You should spread these ingredients out the size of the tostada.
Add tostada on top of all ingredients, then spread a thin layer of Greek yogurt evenly over top of tostada.
Top the tostada with lettuce, tomatoes, and the small, pre-cut tortilla.
Fold the first side of the tortilla towards the center, then fold the piece right next to it, and repeat until finished. This should take 5 folds to seal.
Place the completed Crunchwrap® folded side down into a preheated pan on medium heat.
Brown the Crunchwrap® to your desire, flip, and do the same on the top side.
Grab some Taco Bell® sauce and enjoy!

ingredients.item: tostada (45 Cal) Jalapeno Cheeseburger Crunchwrap Lettuce, chopped Tomato, deseeded and chopped

steps.text: Lightly spray a medium pan with oil and cook the ground beef on medium heat. Add Burger Seasonings on top of beef and break down meat with a spatula.
Let meat cook while occasionally stirring until meat is cooked through. Drain off any excess fat. This is the meat that will be added to the cheese sauce.

Turn a small pot on low heat, add the Nickwrap Filling ingredients, and stir until cheese is melted and everything is combined. • If you need a little extra liquid to make the mixture silky smooth, add 5-10 grams of pickled Jalapeño juice or milk.
Lay tortilla on counter and tear off an additional quarter tortilla, which will be used to seal the Nickwrap.
On top of the tortilla, spread the Jalapeño cheese dip in a circle the size of the tostada.
Directly on top of cheese dip, add Nickwrap Filling, tostada, lettuce, tomato, and quarter tortilla.
Fold the first side of the tortilla towards the center, then fold the piece right next to it, and repeat until finished. This should take 5 folds to seal.
Place the completed Nickwrap folded side down into a preheated pan on medium heat.
Brown the Nickwrap to your desire, flip, and do the same on the top side.
Grab some hot sauce and enjoy!

title: Beefy 5 Layer

ingredients.item: black pepper B E E F Y 5 - L AY E R (Makes 2)
La Banderita® Carb Counter taco tortillas
La Banderita® Carb Counter snack tortillas

steps.text: Add Seasoning Ingredients into small bowl and mix.
Place beans, La Preferida® cheddar cheese, sharp cheddar cheese, and Greek yogurt in four separate bowls.
Lightly spray a pan with oil, turn burner on medium, and start adding small chunks of ground beef until all beef is in the pan.
Once all beef is added, lightly spray the top of the meat with oil, then evenly add seasoning mix over the top. Add 15g of water to the pan.
Stir meat every 1-2 minutes until browned.
Set cooked meat aside in a container or on a plate and cover.
Place the taco tortillas on the counter, add La Preferida® cheddar cheese, and spread evenly across all tortillas.
Take the refried beans, microwave for 20 seconds, and spread evenly across the center of the snack tortillas, leaving about an inch of bare tortilla on each side.
Directly on top of the beans add seasoned beef, sour cream, and sharp cheddar cheese.
Take one side of the taco tortilla and fold it over.
Repeat with the other side and take 1-2 grams of the refried beans, put it on the edge of the tortilla, and stick it to the other side of the tortilla. Repeat with second taco tortilla.
Lay the folded snack tortillas on the middle end of the taco tortillas.
Take the end of the burrito tortilla and lay it on top of the taco tortilla. Then fold one side of the burrito and overlap it with the other side.
You now have 2 perfect beefy 5-layer burritos.
To get the authentic taste and texture of the drive-thru, roll each burrito in a piece of parchment paper, and throw them in the microwave for about 30 seconds.

tips: If you can’t get the snack size tortilla, you can use a taco tortilla and cut off about an inch around it to make it the same size.

steps.text: Wash and cut the veggies.
Add avocado oil to a preheated pan on medium heat and add ground beef to the pan by crumbling in bite-sized chunks.
Add MSG evenly across the beef, break down beef even more using a wooden spatula, and stir constantly until meat is cooked.
Set meat aside on a plate or into a container, wipe down pan, place back on the stovetop, and add avocado oil.
Into a small bowl, add chili powder, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, and black pepper and mix.
Add onions to pan, mix around so oil is spread evenly throughout, and cook 2-3 minutes or until onions become translucent.
Make room in the middle of the pan, add garlic, and stir.
Make room in the middle of the pan again, add the seasoning mix, let it sit for 20-30 seconds, then add cooked meat into the pan. Mix well.
Once combined, add beef broth and tomato sauce, mix to combine, and turn burner to low to let the mixture simmer for about 15 minutes.
Spread cheese evenly across the pita, place taco shell on pita, and microwave for 30 seconds.
Using an oven mitt, hold the pita and taco shell together for 20 seconds or until cheese sticks and glues the pita to the taco shell.
Try Taco Filling and see if it needs any additional salt.
Add filling to the taco shell followed by spicy ranch and lettuce and it’s time to eat.

ingredients.item: La Banderita® Carb Counter taco tortillas
reduced-fat colby jack cheese Tomatoes, diced

steps.text: Add cumin, paprika, chili powder, oregano and MSG into a small bowl and mix to combine. Dice onion.
Place tortillas on a sheet pan lined with aluminum foil. Lightly spray both sides of the tortillas with oil and bake in a preheated 300°F oven for 20 minutes, flipping halfway through.
Add avocado oil to a preheated pan on medium heat and add ground beef to the pan by crumbling in bite-sized chunks.
Add salt evenly across the beef, break down beef even more using a wooden spatula, and stir constantly until meat is cooked.
Make room in the middle of the pan, add onions to it, let them cook for 45 seconds, and mix to combine.
Once onions become translucent, make room in the middle of the pan, add garlic and Seasoning Mix, let it bloom for 30 seconds, and mix to combine.
Add tomato sauce, beef broth, brown sugar, and apple cider vinegar, mix to combine, then turn heat down to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Once meat is finished, try it to see if it needs any additional salt or brown sugar and add more if necessary.
Grab one of the cooked tortillas, add beans to the top, spread onto the entire tortilla, and repeat with the Pizza Filling.
Place the other tortilla on top of the ground beef, top with enchilada sauce and cheese, and bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 3-5 minutes.
Garnish with tomatoes, cut into 4 pieces, and enjoy.

title: Nickchicken

ingredients.item: W E T S TAT I O N 1
black pepper W E T S TAT I O N 2

steps.text: Preheat an air fryer to 400°F.
Cut chicken breast into medium-sized chunks, add to blender, and pulse blender for 10-15 seconds or until it is a similar consistency to ground chicken.
Add ground chicken to a bowl, then add salt and erythritol. Mix together until ingredients are thoroughly combined.

Spray your hands with oil so the ground chicken does not stick to your hands, then separate the chicken mix into 140g-sized balls. Form the chicken balls into patties that are slightly wider than the buns, and place on a piece of parchment paper.
Set up dredging stations by adding all Dredge Station Ingredients to three separate containers and mixing until well combined.
With one hand or your “wet hand,” take a chicken patty, submerge it into the first wet station container, let extra liquid drip off, and place into the dry ingredients container.

Using your other hand or what I like to call your “dry hand,” add the wet patty to your dry flour mixture and push flour into the patty to coat it thoroughly, making sure the sides of the patty are covered as well.

tips: putting patty into the dry station. Then you can easily add the dry mixture to the top of the patty after it is already in the dry station container. (RECIPE CONTINUES)

steps.text: Add Dry Ingredients to a food processor and process on high for 15 seconds.
Add avocado oil and imitation butter to food processor. Heat water up to 110°F.
While processing on high, pour water into the food processor over a 15 second period and continue to process for an additional 30 seconds.
Dump dough onto the counter, KNEAD for 1-2 minutes, form into a ball, put it in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place for one hour or until doubled in size.
While dough is rising, shred the cheese, make the garlic oil, and/or make a FOOLPROOF HOMEMADE MARINARA for dipping sauce.
Pour cornmeal on the top of the dough, flip dough out onto counter, and sprinkle additional cornmeal on the top.
Using the tips of your fingers, press and stretch dough until it is shaped into a roughly 9x8” rectangle.
Mix Inside Cheese together, then sprinkle the inside cheese mixture on half of the dough. Fold the other half of the dough over the cheese, and seal edge of dough.
Rip off 6 inches of parchment paper, place dough on top of it, and slice the folded dough into 8 pieces.
Mix the fat-free cheeses of the Outside Cheeses together and sprinkle over the top of the cheesy bread. Mix the rest of the cheeses together and add over the top of the fat-free cheeses.
Put the finished cheesy bread into a preheated 450°F oven for 12-16 minutes.
Add Toppings and it’s time to eat.

title: Smashburger

ingredients.item: unsalted butter (for bun) Two 70g 93% lean ground beef balls
unsalted butter (for pan) Salt and black pepper, to taste
slice original Velveeta® cheese Tomatoes, thinly sliced Lettuce, finely chopped

steps.text: Sandwich each ball of meat between 2 pieces of 10x10” parchment paper and flatten using a cast iron pan or another flat, heavy object.
Prep vegetables, spread 2g of butter on each bun, then place buns butter side down on a preheated pan on medium-high heat, and toast for 1-2 minutes.
Remove bun from the pan, then add 2.5g of butter and swirl it around the pan.
Add one patty, press into pan for 2 seconds, add salt and pepper, and let the first side cook for 1 minute or until juices have risen to the top of the patty.
Scrape burger off the pan, trying to keep the charred bits attached to the burger and flip it. Add cheese to the top of the patty and cook for an additional minute.
Place the finished patty on the toasted bottom bun, repeat steps 4 and 5 for the second patty, and place the second patty on top of the first patty.
Add tomatoes and lettuce directly onto the patties, put desired ketchup on top bun, and place onto the veggies for a completed burger.

tips: If you have a range hood or another way to ventilate your kitchen, I would utilize it. There will be a lot of smoke from the charring of the ground beef that is necessary to get that authentic smash burger taste. If you don’t have a range hood, opening windows with a fan pointing towards the window would also be a great way to mitigate the smoke.

steps.text: Using a cutting board, trim excess fat off the chicken.
Add Chicken Marinade ingredients to a medium bowl, whisk until combined, add chicken, and make sure every piece is thoroughly coated.
Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for one hour — up to 24 hours for maximum flavor.

When ready to eat, arrange chicken on a sheet pan lined with parchment paper and a wire rack and bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 20-30 minutes or until internal temperature of the chicken reaches 155°F.
Chop tomatoes and onion. Once chicken is finished, slice into bite sized pieces.
Microwave a pita for 10 seconds and layer it with chicken, tzatziki sauce, feta, tomato, onion, and parsley.
Repeat step 6 for any additional servings and it’s time to eat.

title: Meatball Sub

ingredients.item: can Cento® San Marzano whole peeled tomatoes

steps.text: Add olive oil and onions to a preheated oven-safe pot on medium heat and stir to combine.
Press in garlic, stir to combine, and let mixture cook for 3-5 minutes.
Add tomato paste, combine the rest of the Sauce Ingredients thoroughly, and let combination simmer for 1 minute.

Put an immersion blender into the can of tomatoes, blend 15-20 seconds or until smooth, add to the pan with the rest of the Sauce ingredients, and stir to combine. • You can also crush the tomatoes by hand if you prefer.
Once sauce starts bubbling, give it a stir, turn stovetop to low, and let sauce simmer for 20-30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Into a large bowl add milk, bread, and an egg and whisk until mixture looks like a wet banana pudding.
Add the remaining meatball ingredients into the bowl and mix until well combined.
Divide meatball mixture into 120g portions, form into balls, and spread out evenly on a sheet pan lined with parchment paper.
Bake meatballs in a preheated 475°F oven for 15 minutes, flip the meatballs, and continue cooking for another 5-8 minutes.
Turn oven down to 350°F, add meatballs to the sauce, and mix them until completely covered.
Throw pot into the oven, without a lid, along with frozen protein baguettes for 15 minutes.

Cut the baguette in half lengthwise and put a layer of sauce on the bottom piece of the baguette. Add meatballs, another layer of sauce on top of the meatballs, optional parmesan, and close the sandwich with the top of the baguette.

tips: You can use store bought baguettes if you would like, but the protein baguette recipe makes 8 servings that you can store in the freezer for months and is well worth making in my opinion.

ingredients.item: mustard Salt and pepper, to taste

steps.text: Separate the ground beef into three 70g balls.
Place each ball between 2 pieces of 10”x10” parchment paper and flatten using a cast iron pan or another flat, heavy object.
Prep vegetables and add them to a large bowl.
Add 2.5g of butter to a preheated pan on medium high heat and swirl it around the pan.
Add one patty to the pan, press the patty into the pan for 2 seconds using a spatula, add salt and pepper, and let first side cook for 1 minute or until juices have risen to the top of the patty.
Scrape the burger off the pan while trying to keep the charred bits attached to the burger. Flip it, add cheese to the top of the patty, and cook for an additional minute.
Place the finished patty on a cutting board, repeat steps 3-5 for the other patties, and chop the cheeseburgers into bite sized chunks.
Add chopped burgers over the top of the vegetables, top with ketchup and mustard, and it is time to dig in.

ingredients.item: chicken breasts Smoked paprika, to taste Chili powder, to taste

steps.text: PREP and BRINE chicken breasts.

Pat the chicken dry with a paper towel, top the chicken with smoked paprika and chili powder, and add chicken to a preheated 400°F oven for 20-25 minutes or until internal temperature of chicken reaches 155°F.
While chicken is cooking, add butter and corn to a preheated cast iron pan on high heat.
Mix corn and butter to combine, add a pinch of salt over top, and cook for 60- 90 seconds to char the corn.
Toss the corn, cook for an additional 60-90 seconds, then add to a medium bowl. • The corn should literally be popping like popcorn as it finishes cooking.
In a separate medium bowl, add Dressing ingredients and stir to combine.
Add the corn to the dressing and stir to combine. Prep the vegetables and chop the cooked chicken into bite-sized pieces.
To a large bowl, add lettuce, chicken, Corn Dressing, cotija, and green onion. It’s time to eat.

title: Chicken Gyro Salad

steps.text: Using a cutting board, trim excess fat off the chicken breasts.
Add the Chicken Marinade ingredients to a large bowl, whisk until combined, add chicken, and make sure every piece of chicken is thoroughly coated.
Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for one hour, up to 24 hours for maximum flavor.
Prep TZATZIKI SAUCE . • If you plan to eat this recipe through the week, double the recipe to make enough tzatziki for 4 salads.
Prep PICKLED ONION .

When ready to eat, arrange marinated chicken on a sheet pan lined with parchment paper and a wire rack and bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 20- 25 minutes or until internal temperature of the chicken reaches 155°F.
While the chicken is cooking, prep the vegetables and add them to a large bowl.
Chop chicken into bite-sized chunks and add over top of the vegetables along with the tzatziki sauce, feta cheese, and an optional garnish of chopped parsley. Enjoy!

tips: Although there is a lot of prep work for this recipe, if you make it once, you should have enough prepared ingredients for the entire week. The only thing you will have to prep each day is the lettuce, cucumber, and tomato — and even those can be prepared for multiple days at a time if you prefer.

ingredients.item: slices bacon, cooked (80 cal) 1 Hour Calzone Corn meal

steps.text: Put Dry Ingredients into a food processor and process for 30 seconds.
Cut butter in half, add one piece to each side of the food processor, and process for 30 seconds to combine.
While processing, heat water up to 110°F.
Start food processor up again, slowly pour in water over 15-20 seconds, and process for an additional 30 seconds.
Take the blade out and squeeze the dough together a few times to make sure any dry bits are incorporated.
Lightly spray a high-sided container with oil, place dough into the container, and lightly spray the top of the dough with oil as well. Cover and place somewhere warm for 45 minutes.
On a sheet pan lined with parchment paper, arrange one package of bacon into strips, trying not to overlap. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven for 20-25 minutes or until it is cooked to your preference.
Remove your bacon and turn oven up to its highest temperature setting.
In a medium bowl, add ricotta, both mozzarellas, garlic, and salt. Mix to combine.

Lightly spray counter with oil, plop the dough down, and stretch the dough from the middle outward until it is an 8-9” circle. • For better technique on how I do this, please refer to timestamp 5:03 in the video.
Place cheese mix on one half of the dough, leaving a 1” space between the edge of the calzone and the start of the cheese mix.
Place chicken and bacon directly on top of the cheese mix, fold the dough over the fillings, and line up the edges of the dough.
Using your fingertips, push down on the edges of the dough to create an initial seal.
Starting at one end, fold in a small piece of dough. Then directly next to the first fold repeat and keep going until the entire edge has been completely sealed.
Push down the edge of the dough once more, whisk an egg in a glass, brush the outside of the dough with a thin layer of egg wash, and make 3-4 cuts on top of the calzone using a knife.
Put corn meal on the end of a pizza peel or tray, put the calzone on the corn meal, and slide into the oven for 12-14 minutes or until golden brown.
Cut in half, dip into some SPICY RANCH and let’s eat!

title: 1 Hour Pizza

ingredients.item: D O U G H (makes 2 doughs)

steps.text: Add flour, vital wheat gluten, malt powder, garlic powder, salt, and yeast to food processor and process on high for 15 seconds. Add olive oil on top of dry ingredients.
Heat beer to 90°F, then turn food processor on high and slowly pour beer into it over a 20 second period. Keep processing for an additional 30 seconds.
Flip dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 1 minute. Divide dough into two pieces, shape into balls, and put under a damp towel for 15 minutes.
While waiting, shred any cheese needed and/or make a FOOLPROOF HOMEMADE MARINARA .
Lay four 12-inch pieces of parchment paper on the counter and lightly spray with oil.
Grab a dough, pat between your hands until it is roughly 5 inches in diameter, put it on the parchment paper, and cover with another piece of parchment oil side down.
Using a rolling pin, gently roll back and forth at different angles to keep the shape of a circle.
Once pizza is about 12” or to your desired thickness, place in a warm spot in the kitchen to rise for 30 minutes and start preheating oven to 500°F.
Take parchment paper off the top of the dough and add Pizza Ingredients in the order listed.
Put pizza on a tray or using a pizza peel, put pizza in the oven for 8-10 minutes or to preferred doneness.
Slice and EAT.

tips: If you only want to make one pizza you can store the extra dough in the fridge for up to a week. In a high-sided container, spray with oil, place the dough ball (not rolled out), cover, and throw it in the fridge. An hour before you are ready to eat, take the dough out of the fridge and then start at step 4.

ingredients.item: D O U G H (makes 2 doughs)

steps.text: Add all Dough Ingredients into a medium-sized bowl and mix together until you have a shaggy dough (if it’s not perfectly mixed at this stage, that’s okay).
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let sit in a warm place for 15 minutes.
Lightly dust your surface with flour, then turn out your dough. Knead with the palm of your hand for 5 minutes.

Lightly spray your dough bowl with oil, place the kneaded dough back into the bowl, and lightly spray the top of the dough with oil. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap, and place in a warm area to rise for one hour.
To make the sauce, dice the green pepper and the onion and add to a preheated pot on medium heat along with the olive oil.
Cook for 3 minutes or until vegetables become soft, stirring occasionally.
Make room in middle of pan and add minced garlic. Once garlic becomes fragrant, add crushed tomatoes and mix thoroughly.
Add tomato paste, oregano, and crushed red pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring sauce to a simmer, turn burner to low, and let it simmer for about 20- 30 minutes or to preferred thickness.

Add salt and erythritol to the sauce, mix, and put sauce to the side to cool. • You may like more or less salt/erythritol depending on your specific taste buds, so use my amounts as an outline. Add a bit at a time and try it until you are happy.
Split dough in half and round into balls. Grab a bowl that is about 5.5” wide and 1.5” deep, and lightly spray with oil.
Add thin slices of mozzarella to the bowl, covering the interior surface completely, then repeat with the fat free mozzarella. Add homemade sauce to the bowl.
Using your fingers, push out from the middle of the dough, rotating it and working it into a circle, until it is big enough to cover the entire bowl. (RECIPE CONTINUES)
Lay dough over top of bowl and pat the edges so it sticks to the bowl.
Place bowl on a tray and bake in a 400°F oven for 16 minutes.
Once finished pull it out, heat 3g of butter in the microwave until melted, and brush on top.
With high quality oven mitts, quickly flip bowl on tray lined with aluminum foil, slowly go around the rim with a spoon, pull bowl away from pot pie, and EAT.

title: Bbq Chicken

ingredients.item: part-skim mozzarella cheese, shredded Cilantro, chopped BBQ Chicken Sheet Pan Pizza

steps.text: Add all Dry Ingredients in a food processor and process on high for 30 seconds.
Add olive oil onto the dry ingredients, put the top on, turn the processor on high, and slowly add water over 15-20 seconds. Continue to process for an additional 30 seconds.

Lightly spray a large bowl with oil, plop the dough on the counter, form into a ball, and add to the bowl. Lightly spray the top of the bowl with oil and cover for 90 minutes or until doubled in size.
Pour olive oil on sheet pan and spread around the entire sheet pan.
Take dough out of the bowl, let it hang for a couple seconds so it naturally starts stretching into a rectangular shape, and plop it onto the sheet pan.
Using the tips of your fingers, start stretching the dough out across the pan by pressing outwards. Cover with another sheet pan or a damp towel for 30 minutes.
If the corners snapped back a little bit, lightly stretch the dough back into the corners of the pan. Top the dough with BBQ sauce, chicken, fat-free cheese, and part-skim cheese.
Bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 16-20 minutes or until cheese begins to brown.
Garnish with cilantro, slice, and enjoy.

tips: It will not hurt the dough if it rises longer than 90 minutes as it still needs an additional rise anyway. If you need to go somewhere for 2-3 hours, your dough will be ready for you when you get back. T I P : If the dough keeps snapping back when you are stretching it in the sheet pan, cover it and let it rest for 15-20 minutes. This will allow the gluten to relax and help the dough to stretch.

title: Cheese And Pepperoni

ingredients.item: turkey pepperoni Cilantro, chopped Cheese + Pep Sheet Pan Pizza

steps.text: Throw all Dry Ingredients in a food processor and process on high for 30 seconds.
Add olive oil to the food processor, put the top on, turn the processor on high, and slowly add water over 15-20 seconds. Continue processing for an additional 30 seconds.

Lightly spray a large bowl with oil, plop the dough on the counter, form into a ball, put it in the bowl, lightly spray the top of the bowl with oil, and cover for 90 minutes or until doubled in size.
Make FOOLPROOF HOMEMADE MARINARA if not already made.
Pour olive oil onto a sheet pan and spread around the entire sheet pan.
Take dough out of the bowl, let it hang for a couple seconds so it naturally starts stretching into a rectangular shape, and plop it onto the sheet pan.
Using the tips of your fingers, start stretching the dough out across the pan and cover with another sheet pan for 30 minutes.
If the corners snap back a little bit, lightly stretch the dough into the corners of the pan, then top with marinara sauce, part-skim cheese, and cover half of the pizza with pepperoni.
Bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 16-20 minutes or until cheese has a nice browning.
Pull it out of the oven, slice, and enjoy.

tips: It will not hurt the dough if it rises longer than 90 minutes as it still needs an additional rise anyway. If you need to go somewhere for 2-3 hours, your dough will be waiting for you when you get back. T I P : If the dough keeps snapping back when you are stretching it in the sheet pan, cover it and let it rest for 15-20 minutes. This will allow the gluten to relax and help the dough stretch.

ingredients.item: part-skim mozzarella cheese, shredded Pan Pizza

steps.text: Add yeast, flour, salt, erythritol, and garlic to a large bowl and whisk to combine.
Heat milk in the microwave for 20-30 seconds or until it reaches 110°F, add it to the bowl. Using a spoon, mix the rest of the Dough Ingredients until a dough ball starts to form.
Once all ingredients are incorporated, cover with plastic wrap, and let the dough sit for 15 minutes. • The dough will be very wet at this point.
Take the dough ball out of the bowl, KNEAD for 5 minutes, form into a ball, and add it to a lightly oiled bowl. Cover and put in a warm place for 1-2 hours or until doubled in size.

Lightly spray a 10” nonstick pan with oil, put the dough down in the middle of the pan, spread it out evenly until dough just starts to creep up the side of the pan, and lightly spray the top of the dough with oil.
Put pan on the stovetop, turn burner onto medium low heat, and cook the bottom of the dough for 3-5 minutes or until the crust is a deep golden brown.
Put pan onto the work surface and top dough with sauce, parmesan, fat-free cheese, and part-skim cheese.
Broil for 3-4 minutes or until cheese is bubbling and brown on top.
Cut into four slices and enjoy.

title: Deep Dish Pizza

ingredients.item: can Cento® San Marzano whole peeled tomatoes
whole milk low moisture mozzarella cheese, shredded
turkey pepperoni Sauce Optional: grated parmesan cheese

steps.text: Place Dry Ingredients into a food processor, process for 30 seconds, add butter to processor, and blend for an additional 20 seconds or until mixture becomes pebbly-looking.
Turn the processor on high while slowly adding the water over a 30 second period and let dough mixture process for an additional 20-30 seconds.
Flip the dough onto work surface, shape it into a ball, and place it in a lightly oiled medium-sized bowl. Spray the top of the dough with oil and cover for 60 minutes.
Grate 100g of onion on a box grater and drain any extra liquid.
Add olive oil, onion, and garlic to a preheated pot on medium heat, stir to combine, and let them cook for a few minutes while stirring occasionally.
Once the ingredients start to take on some color, add tomato paste and incorporate it into the mixture.
Using your hands, crush one tomato at a time in-between your fingers to your preferred chunkiness. • If any tomatoes are too chunky, simply grab them out of the pan and crush them again.

Add the rest of the sauce ingredients to the pot and stir to combine. Once the sauce comes to a simmer, turn stovetop to low, cover with a lid that lets steam escape, and let it reduce for 20-30 minutes.
After the dough has risen for 60 minutes, refrigerate it for an additional 30 minutes.
Lightly dust work surface with flour, plop the dough down, lightly dust the dough and rolling pin with flour, and roll the dough out into a roughly 13” circle using a rolling pin.
Spread olive oil into a 12” cast iron pan, add the rolled-out dough, and spread it evenly across the bottom and sides of the pan making sure the crust comes all the way up the sides.
Add fat-free cheese, then a layer of whole milk cheese, and top with pepperoni. Add sauce as the top layer of the pizza, making sure everything is evenly spread out.
Bake pizza in a preheated 400°F oven for 30-40 minutes. Once removed from the oven, top with parmesan, slice it, and it is time to eat.

tips: I would wait 5-10 minutes before slicing and another 5 minutes before serving to avoid burning your mouth. You have been warned.

ingredients.item: whole milk low moisture mozzarella cheese, thinly sliced

steps.text: Place dry ingredients into a food processor and mix for 60 seconds.
Add corn oil and olive oil into processor and blend on high for 10 seconds. While blending, slowly add water over a 15-20 second period and continue blending for an additional 20 seconds.
Place dough on the counter. Use a piece of the dough to scrape up any ingredients that remain in the food processor.
Knead the ingredients into the dough for one minute, place in a bowl, cover with cling wrap, and refrigerate for 24-48 hours.

Top the ground pork with salt, black pepper, and garlic powder and knead the seasonings into the meat for 3-4 minutes. Place the sausage in a bowl, cover with cling wrap, and refrigerate for 24-48 hours.
Take dough out of the fridge 2-3 hours before cooking to rise. Spread Crisco® in a 10” springform pan, making sure the bottom and sides are completely covered.
Add dough into the pan and stretch the dough edge to edge, making sure the outside edge of the dough is thicker than the rest of the dough.
Using your fingertips, bring the edge of the dough 1” up the pan. The dough along the edge of the pan should be very thin.

Add fat-free mozzarella on top of the dough. Then overlap the whole milk mozzarella slices along the edge of the pan, followed by another piece placed in the middle. Evenly distribute any remaining slices.
Place pieces of sausage throughout the pan and push the pieces into the cheese to ensure a thin layer of sausage once finished. I like start on the edge of the pan and work my way in.
Add sauce onto the middle of the pizza and push the sauce out to the edges.
Mix the parmesan, romano, and oregano in a small bowl. Spread across the pizza.
Using 3”x4” pieces of aluminum foil, cover the pizza crust at the sauce line and wrap any extra foil around the top of the pan.
Bake pizza in a preheated 450°F oven for 25-30 minutes.
Remove from the oven and immediately place the pizza on a wire rack. Let cool for 5 minutes before slicing into 6 pieces and eating the shit out of it.

title: Chicken

ingredients.item: part-skim mozzarella cheese Chicken Alfredo Pizza

steps.text: BRINE your chicken breasts.
While the chicken is brining, ROAST your garlic.
While the garlic is roasting, add the bread flour, vital wheat gluten, yeast, and salt into a food processor and process on high for 30 seconds.
While processor is running, slowly add water over 15-20 seconds. Continue to process for an additional 30 seconds.

Lightly spray a medium-sized bowl with oil, plop the dough on the counter, form into a ball, and add to the bowl. Lightly spray the top of the dough with oil and cover for 90 minutes or until doubled in size.
Pat the chicken dry with a paper towel and add chicken to a preheated 400°F oven for 20-25 minutes or until internal temperature of the chicken reaches 155°F.
Cut the chicken into bite sized pieces.
Cover the work surface with corn meal, add the dough on top of the corn meal bottom side down, and cover the top of the dough with corn meal as well.
Stretch the dough until it is about 11” in diameter, leaving the crust thicker than the rest of the pizza. Lightly dust a pizza peel with corn meal.
Toss the dough back and forth between your hands to remove any excess corn meal and place the dough onto the pizza peel.
Top the dough with alfredo sauce, garlic, chicken, Parmigiano Reggiano, and fat- free and part-skim mozzarella.
Bake in a preheated oven at the highest temperature possible (mine oven goes to 550°F) for 5-8 minutes or until cheese starts browning
Add to a wire rack to cool, slice, and it’s time to eat.

tips: Grill the chicken breasts instead for greater flavor. T I P : If you would like slices that don’t bend or break, once the pizza has cooled off, I would add the pizza back in the oven for 60-90 seconds. The bottom will become crispy again while holding all the toppings as you eat it. F Y I : Only 6 grams of corn meal was used to calculate the macros. During the testing of this recipe, I took the average of how much corn meal was used on the pizza versus what was left over.

steps.text: Add flour, vital wheat gluten, yeast, and salt into a food processor and mix on high for 1 minute.
While mixing, add butter one cube at a time and mix for an additional 15 seconds.
While mixing, add water over a 20-30 second period and continue blending for an additional 30 seconds.
Lightly spray a medium-sized bowl with oil, plop the dough on the counter, form into a ball, and add to the bowl. Cover for 1.5-2 hours.
Add all sauce ingredients directly into the crushed tomato can and mix. Add to a container and refrigerate.
Add all spices to a small bowl besides the garlic cloves and bay leaf. Add spices to a preheated saucepan on medium heat and mix together. Let dry roast for 30-60 seconds.
Add bay leaf, garlic cloves, and beef broth to the saucepan and bring to a simmer.
Add beef bouillon and stir. Turn the pot to low and allow it to simmer for 30 minutes.
Place a strainer over a medium-sized bowl, pour the au jus through the strainer, and wipe the saucepan with a towel.
Discard spices, pour the au jus back into the saucepan, and place back onto the stovetop.
Add roast beef to the saucepan and heat the beef juice to 140°F. Remove pan from heat and allow meat to marinade.
Place a strainer on top of a plate, add giardiniera and allow to drain for at least 20 minutes.
Grab the same bowl used to strain the spices and strain the beef. Allow beef to drain for 20 minutes.
Using a paper towel, dab the giardiniera to remove as much excess oil as possible and weigh out 120 grams. • If there is too much oil or au jus on the pizza, it will end up a soggy mess.
Using your hands, squeeze as much juice out of the beef as possible and add to a medium bowl. (RECIPE CONTINUES)
Lightly sprinkle corn meal onto the work surface, flip dough onto the corn meal and add additional corn meal to the bottom of the dough.

Flip the dough back over and using a rolling pin, roll back and forth two times. Turn the dough 90° or a quarter turn, and roll back and forth two more times. Repeat this process until the dough is 10-11” .
Pick up the dough, make two fists underneath it and move the dough in a circular motion. Make sure you go around the entire dough. The dough should be about 12” now.

Take the dough and grab the crust by your finger tips. Similar to spinning the dough with your fists, do the same thing to the crust and go all the way around the pizza. The dough should now have reached final form at 14” .
Roll out the edges of the dough to remove any air pockets and flatten.
Place dough on top of a sheet of parchment paper and add pizza sauce, leaving about a quarter inch for a crust.
Add remaining toppings in the order listed and add to a preheated 550°F oven for 8-10 minutes.
Enjoy an authentic Chicago style pizza.

ingredients.item: D O U G H ( M A K E S 2 )
fat-free mozzarella cheese, shredded Detroit Pizza 98g brick cheese, shredded

steps.text: Add flour, vital wheat gluten, salt, and yeast to a large bowl. Whisk to combine.
Add water and mix the ingredients using a spoon until a shaggy dough forms.
Go in with a wet hand, press the dough down, and fold it onto itself. Repeat until all dry ingredients are fully hydrated. Cover for 20 minutes.

Using a wet hand, perform a stretch and fold by pulling one side of the dough as high as possible then folding it over itself. Turn the bowl 90 degrees and repeat 3-4 more times until all dough has been stretched.
Flip the dough over and form into a ball by sliding your hand underneath the dough and pulling it in a circular motion towards the side of the bowl.
Cover the dough for 20 minutes, repeat steps 4 and 5, and divide the dough into 2 pieces. Each piece should weigh roughly 275g.

Form each piece into individual balls by flattening the dough with your fingers, folding each side of the dough into the middle, flipping it over, and rolling it in a circular motion until a ball is formed.
Grab 2 high-sided containers, lightly spray them with oil, and add the dough balls. Cover with a lid and refrigerate for a minimum of 24 hours. (96 hours creates peak flavor)
Add olive oil and garlic to a preheated pot on medium heat and mix. Sauté the garlic for 30 seconds, add oregano and basil, and stir to combine.
After 10-15 seconds, immediately add all other sauce ingredients and mix.
Bring sauce to a simmer, turn the heat down to low, and let it reduce for 15 minutes. Add to a container and refrigerate.
Grab an 8x10” hard-anodized pan and spread Crisco® around the bottom and sides of the pan. Add dough to the pan and cover.
After 1-2 hours, spread the dough out edge to edge and cover for 2-4 hours
Parbake dough in a preheated 500°F oven for 6-8 minutes and get all other toppings ready.
Remove pan from oven, add toppings, and bake for another 8-12 minutes.
Immediately place the pizza on a wire rack so the bottom stays crispy.
Divide into 4 slices and eat.

title: Candied Pecans

steps.text: Add Dry Ingredients into a medium-sized bowl and whisk together.
In a separate medium-sized bowl, separate an egg white from the yolk and whisk the white for 60 seconds or until it becomes frothy.
Add vanilla extract and water to the frothed egg white and whisk until combined.
Add ¼ dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until combined. Repeat with ¼ of the dry ingredients at a time until dry ingredients are fully mixed in.
Pour pecans into the bowl and using a spatula, mix ingredients together until all pecans are fully coated.
Spread pecans into one even layer on a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper or silicone baking mat.
Bake in a preheated oven at 300°F for 30 minutes, mixing the pecans halfway through the baking process.
Let cool for one hour and store in an airtight container.

tips: If you want a lighter roast, turn oven temperature down to 250°F and cook for the same amount of time.

title: Watermelon Sorbet

steps.text: Wash and dry the outside of the watermelon and put it on the biggest cutting board you have.
Cut the ends off the watermelon, trying to make sure to cut off as little of the pink part as possible, then cut the watermelon in half.
Put half of the watermelon off to the side and the other half cut side down on the cutting board.
Cut where the pink meets the white (the rind) and try to follow that all the way down.
Go around the entire watermelon until there is no more rind remaining, but if a little rind remains, that is okay.
Cube the red flesh of the watermelon and set aside.
Repeat steps 3-6 for the other half of the watermelon.
Load blender up, blend for 30 seconds or until watermelon is broken down, put into storage containers, and repeat until the entire watermelon has been pureed.
Directly into a pint add Pint Ingredients and using a handheld blender, mix for 30 seconds.
Put the top on the pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Take the pint out of the freezer, run it under warm water for 60 seconds, dry the pint off, and load it into the CREAMi®.
Run pint on the sorbet function and directly after on the re-spin function.
Unload the pint and using a spoon, push the contents of the CREAMi® down, smooth and level the surface, load it back up, and hit the re-spin button.
A perfect sorbet consistency has now been achieved and it is time to eat.

tips: Instead of blending every gram of watermelon, put some chunks in containers to have as a quick snack or great pre-workout meal. T I P : You can buy pre-cut fruit to make the first part of this process go much faster, but it will also be much more expensive to do so. In addition, after you cut and puree the watermelon you will have enough for 10+ sorbets, so it’s worth putting the extra work in.

title: Strawberry Sorbet

steps.text: Rinse strawberries under water and cut off the stems.
Add Pint Ingredients into the pint and using an immersion blender crush strawberries and mix for 60-90 seconds or until everything is smooth.
Put the top on the pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Take the pint out of the freezer, run it under warm water for 60 seconds, dry the pint off, and load it into the CREAMi®.
Run pint on the sorbet function and directly after on the re-spin function.
A perfect sorbet consistency has now been achieved and it is time to eat.

tips: If you don’t have an immersion blender, you can use a food processor or regular blender to break down the strawberries. T I P : If you want a more ice cream-like consistency, unload the pint after the re-spin and using a spoon, push the contents of the CREAMi® down, smooth and level the surface, and re-spin for a second time.

steps.text: Add flour to large bowl and heat it up in the microwave in ten second intervals until it reaches 155°F.
Add the rest of the Dry Ingredients to the bowl and whisk thoroughly.
In a separate large bowl, microwave butter in ten second intervals until melted.
Add the rest of the Wet Ingredients over the butter and whisk until combined.

Add the Dry Ingredients to the Wet Ingredients in 3-4 parts and combine using a whisk. Once one part is fully mixed in, add another, and repeat until finished. • When mixture becomes too thick for the whisk, switch to a spatula.
To ensure everything is well combined, bring mixture up the sides of the bowl with the spatula and wipe down the sides of the bowl. Repeat this process 3-5 times.
Add chocolate chips, mix until combined, and put in a container.
Enjoy right away or for peak flavor, refrigerate for 24 hours.
